<otsl><loc_41><loc_144><loc_458><loc_163><fcel>Type number<fcel>Marking code<nl><fcel>PMEG3010EB<fcel>KA<nl><caption><loc_42><loc_137><loc_125><loc_143>Table 4. Marking codes</caption></otsl>
<section_header_level_1><loc_42><loc_174><loc_144><loc_183>8. Limiting values</section_header_level_1>
<otsl><loc_41><loc_206><loc_458><loc_301><fcel>Symbol<fcel>Parameter<fcel>Conditions<fcel>Min<fcel>Max<fcel>Unit<nl><fcel>V$_{R}$<fcel>reverse voltage<ecel><fcel>-<fcel>30<fcel>V<nl><fcel>I$_{F}$<fcel>forward current<fcel>T$_{sp}$ ≤ 55 °C<fcel>-<fcel>1<fcel>A<nl><fcel>I$_{FRM}$<fcel>repetitive peak forward current<fcel>t$_{p}$ ≤ 1 ms; δ ≤ 0.25<fcel>-<fcel>3<fcel>A<nl><fcel>I$_{FSM}$<fcel>non-repetitive peak forward current<fcel>t$_{p}$ = 8 ms; square wave; T$_{j(init)}$ = 25 °C<fcel>-<fcel>5<fcel>A<nl><fcel>P$_{tot}$<fcel>total power dissipation<fcel>T$_{amb}$ ≤ 25 °C<fcel>[1]<fcel>-<fcel>310<nl><fcel>T$_{j}$<fcel>junction temperature<ecel><fcel>-<fcel>150<fcel>°C<nl><fcel>T$_{amb}$<fcel>ambient temperature<ecel><fcel>-65<fcel>150<fcel>°C<nl><fcel>T$_{stg}$<fcel>storage temperature<ecel><fcel>-65<fcel>150<fcel>°C<nl><caption><loc_42><loc_319><loc_190><loc_330>9. Thermal characteristics</caption></otsl>
<otsl><loc_41><loc_346><loc_458><loc_386><fcel>Symbol<fcel>Parameter<fcel>Conditions<fcel>Min<fcel>Typ<fcel>Max<fcel>Unit<nl><fcel>R$_{th(j-a)}$<fcel>thermal resistance from in free air<fcel>[1] [2]<fcel>-<fcel>-<fcel>400<fcel>K/W<nl><fcel>R$_{th(j-sp)}$<fcel>thermal resistance from junction to solder point<fcel>[3]<fcel>-<fcel>-<fcel>75<fcel>K/W<nl></otsl>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_42><loc_392><loc_431><loc_403>[1] For Schottky barrier diodes thermal runaway has to be considered, as in some applications the reverse power losses P$_{R}$ are a significant part of the total power losses.</list_item>
<list_item><loc_42><loc_403><loc_316><loc_409>[2] Device mounted on an FR4 PCB, single-sided copper, tin-plated and standard footprint.</list_item>
<list_item><loc_42><loc_409><loc_148><loc_415>[3] Soldering point of cathode tab.</list_item>
</unordered_list>
